Oracle reported FY 2026 revenue of $57 billion, a market‑value of about $347 billion, 2.88 billion shares outstanding, and highlighted continued growth in its cloud‑and‑software businesses while carrying extensive senior‑note debt maturing through 2065.
Oracle announced its Q4 2026 financial results and declared dividends for preferred and common stock.
